local_work_summary: BUG-FUNC-001 tracks the current OxFml handoff for array-involved binary arithmetic through the OxFunc operator surface and the related closure-surface correction work.
BUG-FUNC-002 tracks the broader ordinary-operator broadcast rule proven by local Excel comparison and the downstream handoff needed to remove OxFml fallback behavior honestly.
BUG-FUNC-003 tracks the first-class same-sheet MultiArea seam correction across OP_UNION_REF, AREAS, INDEX, and related reference-sensitive transport surfaces.
HANDOFF-OXFUNC-002 tracks the follow-on seam narrowing that moves same-sheet MultiArea value materialization into OxFunc-owned resolver-driven combination semantics.

BUG-FUNC-004 tracks the current corpus follow-on: IF/IFS empty-text condition is pinned as no local bug, while operators plus criteria/database/SWITCH reopen around Excel near-equality numeric comparison tolerance.

BUG-FUNC-005 is closed: fresh Excel replay on 2026-04-29 confirmed POWER(0,0) and OP_POWER 0^0 must surface #NUM!, and the local Rust/Lean correction is landed on 5d54d7f4ab2cdde6458272292d15ae1b317a0fef.

BUG-FUNC-006 is closed: XMATCH, MATCH, VLOOKUP, and HLOOKUP are landed on 5d54d7f4ab2cdde6458272292d15ae1b317a0fef; the adjacent XLOOKUP correction is landed on b1faa5e8f08cd534601dc57bf79a9fed3ff26972.

W080 seed rows are closed on landed refs for BUG-FUNC-007, BUG-FUNC-008, and BUG-FUNC-016; W090 owns the broader systematic function-array-support sweep across the supported surface without per-case prose for pass-heavy rows.
BUG-FUNC-008 is closed on landed ref 2e818f03a71ba393690275a7fb437ddd9a6bf760; broader supported-surface array-support review now continues under W090.
BUG-FUNC-016 is closed: the second bounded W080 follow-on batch for FIND, SEARCH, REPLACE, PROPER, and SUBSTITUTE is landed on b1faa5e8f08cd534601dc57bf79a9fed3ff26972.

BUG-FUNC-009 tracks the reopened RATE lane where Excel returns a small positive periodic rate for a mortgage-style omitted-guess row but the local default-guess solver path currently fails with #NUM!.

BUG-FUNC-017 is closed on landed ref 0b966d0ee7c8ce4a327b0b3090f9a108248c37fd: W090 tranche A first found 32 Excel spill vs local #VALUE! mismatches across ROUND/ROUNDDOWN/ROUNDUP/TRUNC/CEILING/FLOOR/ATAN2/BASE families, then reran 34/34 exact typed bit matches after the array-lift repair.
BUG-FUNC-018 tracks the first generated W090 successor sweep result: 127 local #VALUE! vs Excel array-result mismatches across 69 surfaces and arg1/arg2/arg3 scalar-parameter axes.
BUG-FUNC-019 tracks IMPRODUCT and IMSUM array-literal aggregate handling found by the W090 engineering successor tranche: Excel returns scalar complex text while local returns #VALUE!.
BUG-FUNC-020 tracks EXPAND with array-valued pad_with reaching a local unreachable panic where Excel returns #VALUE!.
